name: Junk Pirates Blueprint Package
desc: Enables heavy industry to construct the more common ship hulls, weapons, and fighter LPCs from the Junk Pirates faction.

name: Junk Pirates Advanced Blueprint Package
desc: Enables heavy industry to construct a select few of the more advanced ship hulls, weapons, and fighter LPCs from the Junk Pirates faction.

desc: Enables heavy industry to construct the more common ship hulls, weapons, and fighter LPCs from the ASP Syndicate.

name: PACK Advanced Blueprint Package
desc: Enables heavy industry to construct a select few of the more advanced ship hulls, weapons, and fighter LPCs from the P.A.C.K.

desc: Enables heavy industry to construct the more common ship hulls, weapons, and fighter LPCs from the shadowy ASP Syndicate Familia.
